payload.label: sink
payload.long_description: White porcelain sink basin with a noticeable brown/orange chip and flaked enamel on the front rim; chrome faucet and part of the countertop are visible at the top of the crop, while the lower basin and surrounding supports are partially cut off by the image edge (edge-cropped); appears photographed from close distance (approximately 0.6 m).
